# PleasureZone Uganda — Full Documentation

## Overview
PleasureZone Uganda (ugsex.com) is a full-stack e-commerce marketplace for intimate wellness products, serving customers across Uganda. The platform supports both platform-owned and third-party seller products, with features including flash sales, subscription boxes, loyalty rewards, gift orders, and multiple payment methods including Mobile Money.

## Product Catalog

### Categories
1. **Vibrators & Toys** — Personal massagers, bullet vibrators, rabbit vibrators, wand massagers
2. **Lingerie & Apparel** — Bras, panties, bodysuits, corsets, robes, stockings
3. **Lubricants & Personal Care** — Water-based, silicone-based, flavored lubricants, massage oils
4. **Couples Toys** — Products designed for partner use, intimacy enhancers
5. **Sexual Wellness** — Health supplements, kegel exercisers, intimate hygiene
6. **Accessories** — Storage, cleaning products, bedroom accessories

### Product Features
- Detailed product descriptions and specifications
- Customer reviews and ratings (1-5 stars)
- Multiple product images
- Size guides where applicable
- Related product recommendations
- Flash sale pricing with countdown timers
- "Back in stock" notifications
- Price drop alerts
- Product Q&A section

## Shopping Experience

### Search & Discovery
- Full-text product search with suggestions
- Category browsing with subcategories
- Advanced filters: price range, rating, stock status
- Sort by: featured, price, rating, newest
- Trending products and bestsellers
- Personalized recommendations
- Daily deals

### Cart & Checkout
- Persistent cart (syncs across devices when logged in)
- Guest checkout available
- Multiple payment methods:
  - Mobile Money (MTN Uganda, Airtel Money)
  - Credit/Debit Cards (Visa, Mastercard)
  - PayPal
  - Cash on Delivery
  - Store Credit
  - Gift Cards
  - Installment plans (buy now, pay later)
  - Layaway plans
- Coupon/promo code support
- Gift wrapping and gift messaging
- Pickup point delivery option

### Delivery
- Same-day delivery in Kampala
- 1-3 day delivery nationwide in Uganda
- Discreet, plain packaging (no branding)
- Anonymous billing name on statements
- Real-time order tracking with delivery OTP
- Multiple delivery time slot options
- Pickup points available

## Customer Features
- User accounts with order history
- Wishlist with collections
- Loyalty points program
- Referral rewards
- Subscription boxes (monthly curated boxes)
- Price drop alerts
- Back-in-stock notifications
- Gift cards (purchase and redeem)
- Daily check-in rewards
- Order returns and refunds

## Marketplace
- Third-party seller storefronts
- Seller ratings and badges (New, Verified, Trusted, Top)
- Escrow payment protection
- Dispute resolution system
- Seller-specific coupons

## Content
- Blog with wellness guides, product reviews, and relationship tips
- Beginner's guide to intimate wellness
- FAQ section
- Couples curated collections

## Technical Details
- Progressive Web App (installable)
- Mobile-responsive design
- Dark mode support
- Multi-currency display
- Service worker for offline browsing
- Fast page loads with ISR (Incremental Static Regeneration)

## Privacy & Discretion
PleasureZone Uganda prioritizes customer privacy:
- All packages ship in plain, unmarked boxes
- Billing statements show a neutral business name
- Discreet mode available (changes app appearance)
- Guest checkout (no account required)
- Automatic guest data deletion after configurable period
- Encrypted customer data (names, phones, addresses)
- Stealth PWA manifests available (app can appear as calculator or notes app)
